# Cartagena Up

A locally verified, bilingual guide to Cartagena, Colombia —
cafés, coworking spaces, events, and beaches, updated by
someone who lives here.

## Work in Cartagena
WiFi-tested cafés and coworking spaces, verified in person.
/work/

## This Week in Cartagena
Current events, cultural programming, music, and nightlife.
/events/

## Beaches & Islands
Honest logistics for Barú, Playa Blanca, and the Rosario Islands.
/beaches/

## En Español
/es/
